---
title: "Rāg Śyāma"
subtitle: "*Papīhā bole le*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Sadāraṅga &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Ektāl (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> papīhā bole le re sāvana kī ritu āi tore<br>sadāraṅga upayogī piya gara lāgorī<br>dhāya rasa batiyā barasa barasa re

**Antarā**

> dāmini kuḍhata jīya ḍara lāge na kauna rahungī nyāre<br>mahammadaśā pyāre hita deya cita deya nani nani bundariya<br>prīta sarasa sarasa re

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Ektāl is a 12-beat cycle divided as **2 + 2 + 2 + 2 + 2 + 2** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **O**, **X**, **O**, **3**, **4**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the twelve columns correspond to beats 1–12, with sam **X** at beat 1, khālī **O** at beat 3, tali **X** (often written as 2) at beat 5, khālī **O** at beat 7, tali **3** at beat 9, and tali **4** at beat 11.

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak). Capital letters (like $M$, $D$) denote teevra or shuddh notes depending on the specific raga's convention compared to lowercase letters.
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .ektal-madhyalay}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **X** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | $\lb{\mathrm{P}\mathrm{M}}$ | P | G | m |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **pa** | **pī** | **-** | **hā** |
| D | - | N | D | $\lb{\mathrm{N}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | N | $\lb{\mathrm{D}\mathrm{P}}$ | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{D}}\mathrm{P}}$ | m | G | m |
| **bo** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **le** | **le** | **-** | **pa** | **pī** | **-** | **hā** |
| D | - | N | D | $\lb{\mathrm{N}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | N | D | - | $\lb{\mathrm{P}\mathrm{P}}$ | - | $\lb{\mathrm{D}\mathrm{P}}$ | P |
| **bo** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **le** | **le** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **re** | **-** |
| $\lb{\mathrm{m}\mathrm{G}}$ | m | R | R | S | - | S | S | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{S}}\mn{\mathrm{N}}}$ | R | S | S |
| **sā** | **-** | **va** | **na** | **kī** | **-** | **ri** | **tu** | **ā** | **i** | **to** | **re** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{S}}\mn{\mathrm{N}}}$ | S | m | m | m | m | m | m | m | G | m | G |
| **sa** | **dā** | **ra** | **ṅga** | **u** | **pa** | **yo** | **gī** | **pi** | **ya** | **ga** | **ra** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{m}}\mathrm{G}}$ | P | P | $\lb{\mathrm{M}\mathrm{P}}$ | D | D | P | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{m}}\mathrm{G}}$ | m | $\lb{\mathrm{D}\mathrm{P}}$ | P |
| **lā** | **go** | **rī** | **dhā** | **-** | **ya** | **ra** | **sa** | **ba** | **ti** | **yā** | **-** |
| m | G | m | R | S | P | M | $\lb{\mathrm{P}\mathrm{D}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{M}}\mathrm{P}}$ | m | G | m |
| **ba** | **ra** | **sa** | **ba** | **ra** | **sa** | **re** | **-** | **pa** | **pī** | **-** | **hā** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .ektal-madhyalay}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **X** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $\lb{\mathrm{P}\mathrm{M}}$ | D | P | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **dā** | **mi** | **ni** | **ku** | **ḍha** | **ta** | **jī** | **ya** | **ḍa** | **ra** | **lā** | **ge** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | D | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{-\mathrm{N}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{R}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | D | $\lb{-\mathrm{P}}$ |
| **na** | **kau** | **na** | **ra** | **hu** | **ṅgī** | **nyā** | **-** | **re** | **-** | **-** | **ma** |
| $\lb{\mathrm{P}\mathrm{P}\mathrm{D}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{N}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | N | D | $\lb{\mathrm{M}\mathrm{D}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{P}\mathrm{P}}$ | G | $\lb{\mathrm{m}\mathrm{P}}$ | G | $\lb{-\mathrm{m}}$ | R | S |
| **ha** | **-** | **mma** | **da** | **śā** | **-** | **pyā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **re** |
| S | S | m | G | P | M | P | N | D | $\lb{\mathrm{N}\mathrm{D}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **hi** | **ta** | **de** | **ya** | **ci** | **ta** | **de** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ya** |
| $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\tr{\mathrm{m}}\tr{\mathrm{G}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{m}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{D}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{D}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\tr{\mathrm{R}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **na** | **ni** | **na** | **ni** | **bun** | **da** | **ri** | **yā** | **-** | **prī** | **-** | **ta** |
| N | D | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | D | P | $\lb{\mathrm{M}\mathrm{P}\mathrm{D}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{N}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{N}\mathrm{D}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{P}\mathrm{M}}$ | G | m |
| **sa** | **ra** | **sa** | **sa** | **ra** | **sa** | **re** | **-** | **pa** | **pī** | **-** | **hā** |

:::
